name: London Dreams
overview: A maid’s troubled life receives a sudden ray of hope when a handsome, foreign-educated employer enters her life. But as kindness gets mistaken for love, a determination builds in her mind to possess what she desires by any means. The line between love and obsession, right and wrong blurs, and one question remains- Will she pay a price she never imagined?
